'''4-S''' was a chrome-colored droid owned by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] pirate Captain [[Swagg]], prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

The captain desired to steal several [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] relics from the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]] and to this end, he employed 4-S along with its fellow droids [[3-S]] and [[5-S]] to destroy the arena in [[Lake Umberbool]], but the attempt was thwarted by [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] and [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Fassa (Gungan)|Fassa]].

This resulted in the destruction of 4-S, and his head was later used by the Gungans against Swagg.
